data.description: ArtifactBar.tsx:168 uses text-vermillion hover:text-vermillion-light but both resolve to #f65058 in tailwind.config.ts:21. The hover is a no-op — zero visual change. Fix: use text-scarlet hover:text-scarlet-dark for actual hover feedback.
data.title: Fix ArtifactBar hover state (vermillion-light = vermillion, no visual feedback)

data.body:
REVIEW PASS. Reviewed the diff cold against acceptance criteria:

1. ArtifactBar.tsx line 168: text-vermillion hover:text-vermillion-light replaced with text-scarlet hover:text-scarlet-dark. scarlet-dark (#d4434a) is visually distinct from scarlet (#f65058) — hover now produces clear color darkening.

2. tailwind.config.ts: vermillion changed from { DEFAULT: '#f65058', light: '#f65058' } to plain string '#f65058'. This eliminates the misleading light variant while preserving backward compatibility — all existing text-vermillion usages (6 files, 8 occurrences) continue to work.

3. No other files referenced vermillion-light — the change is safe.

4. pnpm build passes cleanly (13 static pages generated, no errors).

All four acceptance criteria met. No issues found.
